title: timmia obliqua
intro: Timmia obliqua is a type of liverwort, a small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the moss family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate digestion and improve liver function. The health benefits of Timmia obliqua include its potential to treat liver disorders, jaundice, and digestive issues such as constipation and diarrhea. In herbal preparations, Timmia obliqua can be used as a tea, powder, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
